spec.name: The Northeast End Of The Concourse
spec.description: You are at the Concourse. The city wall is just east and a small promenade goes west. Looking across the river you see a building that resembles a warehouse. The Concourse continues south along the city wall.

extra_descs.description: It is built from large grey rocks that have been fastened to each other with some kind of mortar. It is far too high to climb.
